title: Pack of 6 Natural Sponges for Washing Up - Made from Cellulose, Coconut & Recycled Fibres - Eco Friendly, Odour Free, Non Scratch Scrubbers for Kitchen & Bathroom - Green America & PETA Certified
features: NATURAL ECO WASHING UP SPONGES - Make an eco-conscious choice with our AIRNEX eco washing up sponges multipack. Reusable and suitable for the dishwasher, these large packs of non scratch sponge scourers outlast regular sponges, without getting stinky.

GO GREENER AT HOME - Crafted from a blend of 100% natural and recycled fibres, these natural dish sponge for washing up minimises waste while ensuring durability. When it's time to dispose, separate the two halves; compost the white sponge and dispose of the scrubber.

HEALTHIER CLEANING - Unlike a regular dishwasher sponges, AIRNEX natural sponges feature a quick drying porous structure that minimises unpleasant odours. Plus, these washing sponges for dishes don’t need replacing as often.

ABSORBENT & NON-SCRATCH - These dish washing sponge rapidly absorbs liquids and create a rich lather, making dishwashing a breeze. Effortlessly remove tough grease & grime from delicate surfaces and dishes without leaving scratches.

PLANET-CONSCIOUS - AIRNEX is committed to defending the climate. All of the cellulose sponges kitchen packaging is recyclable and plastic-free. AIRNEX has also teamed up with 'Trees for the Future' to support reforestation, your purchase can result in two new trees.
